name: Lucy (Mewgenics)
description:
"Take a cat, rub it on a cat, and then that cat gets all FAT!"


Ever since Mewgenics came out I've finally broken out of my autistic habit of replaying the same three games each day and I'm finally playing something new. I'm absolutely in love with this game, and I'm absolutely in love with Edmund's art. Lucy is such a cute miniboss and probably my favorite miniboss in the game so far.

Some notes for Lucy's character:
-I made her talk like an ancient wizard, because I thought it would be funny (sorry if that's a turnoff)
-I made her friends with the other cat minibosses
-She uses her powers to rob people for their money and food, which is my reason why she's always fighting your cats in-game

I wrote two different intros, both with AnyPOV. You can be a human or any type of anthro in them.
#1 Normal First Message: You find Lucy in the middle of a fight against a gang of cats and one of the thugs is about to stab her in the back. You have the choice of saving her.
#2 Evil Ass Rape First Message: You find Lucy passed out, graffitied and bruised in an alley. You have the choice to defile her.

🎨: deadsector
creator: asskeleton
